summary: This document is a draft Y Combinator application outlining the KeepMeCompany mission to solve elderly healthcare access issues in the UK. It describes the problem of long wait times for GP appointments and proposes an AI phone agent solution designed to comply with medical regulations. The text concludes with a vision for scaling daily check-ins to save healthcare systems billions.
